back_translation: For the choirmaster. With stringed instruments. Of David.
Hear my cry, O God; listen to my prayer.
From the end of the earth I call to You when my heart grows faint; lead me to the rock that is higher than I.
For You have been my refuge, a strong tower against the enemy.
Let me dwell in Your tent forever; let me take refuge under the shelter of Your wings. Selah
For You, O God, have heard my vows; You have given the heritage of those who fear Your name.
Add length of days to the king's life; may his years endure through all generations.
May he be enthroned before God forever; appoint steadfast love and faithfulness to watch over him.
Then I will sing praises to Your name forever, fulfilling my vows day by day.
